form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr5) over 1785m after showing early speed at Stawell, beaten 8 m by Roblen Ranger (2:10.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 49 on April 3 at $4. Two runs back 4th (Fr1) over 1680m at Terang, beaten 9 m by Morris Brown (1:59.60) in NR up to 55 on March 27 at $26. This looks too tough.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Sr1) over 2190m at Shepparton, beaten 20 m by Blackjack Whacko (2:41.00) in NR 55 to 64 on March 24 at $31. Two runs back 3rd (Sr2) over 1690m at Shepparton, at the bell was 3rd-3.65 beaten 3.5 m by With In Reason (2:00.40) in NR 55 to 60 on March 17 at $41. Will find this tough.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 1.3 m (Sr2) at Riverina Paceway (2:03.70) beating Captain Molly in NR up to 55 on April 4 at $2.60. Two runs back raced just off the speed and boxed on; won by 1.75 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Riverina Paceway (2:02.70) beating Rudimentary in NR up to 53 on March 20 at $1.28 at the bell was 2nd-0.9. Top contender.

form.formComment: Good performance when beaten by 6 m finishing third behind Dangerous at this track over 1650m in a NR 65 or better on March 25 at $34. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Hes No Romeo at this track over 1650m in a NR 60 to 75 on April 1 at $13. Close to a win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in in and contacted marker pegs around the final turn.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run he game effort despite getting well back, when 3rd (Sr6) over 2150m after being wide early at this track was 5th-7.7m on the pegs at the bell, beaten 8 m by Ideal Moth (2:37.10) in NR up to 59 on June 25 at $13. Go well while fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked while trailing Katunga Express which galloped rounding the first turn.
Over raced throughout the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Last start failed to finish when he ran at Melton on February 21 over 2240m. Before that, broke in score up and was out of position at the start 12th (Sr3) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 35 m by Montana Pride (2:02.70) in 0W/15 0K stake on February 7 at $13. Well placed to make amends.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke in the score up, out of position at the start.
Held up around the home turn before using the sprint lane.
Contacted marker pegs near 300m, when in restricted racing room.
Broke in the score up but filled its position by the candy pole.

form.formComment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here second-up after a week-and-a-half.

form.formComment: Brings the right form to the table. Won by 9 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Launceston (2:01.20) beating Ray Dan in NR 65 to 74 on March 29 at $1.45. Two runs back posted a big 7 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at Launceston (2:47.60) beating Rocky Stride in NR 60 to 69 on March 22 at $1.18. Big chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Led one out line shifted up the track.
Hampered, on run to finish. RAC 2
Hung out near the 250m inconveniencing Brave Art.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten after breaking at Shepparton on March 24. At the run before 6th (Fr4) over 1690m at Kilmore beaten 50 m by Breathe Easy (2:03.50) in NR 48 to 51 on March 12 at $2.15. Capable of more than he has shown recently. Needs to show more.

form.formComment: Last start then settled down to finish ninth over 1650m at this track last time out. Two runs back 3rd (Fr6) over 1755m after showing early speed at Echuca was 3rd-6.7 at the bell, beaten 12 m by Eye See Philtra (2:06.90) in NR 55 to 59 on March 10 at $10. Consider for exotics.
